debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
hf_bounded : ∀ (x : ↑(spectrum ℂ a)), ‖f x‖ ≤ C
hX : Measurable f
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C

failed_attempts:
have hXm : Measurable f := (BorelSpace.measurable_eq (α := spectrum ℂ a)).symm ▸ hX
  have h1 := ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_variation_mul_bound
    (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) f C hf_bounded hXm
  have h2 := cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  have hvar_le : ((cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ).toReal ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
    rw [← ofReal_norm_eq_enorm x, ← ofReal_norm_eq_enorm y] at h2
    exact le_trans
      (ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top) h2)
      (by rw [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg x),
              ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg y)])
  by_cases hnt : Nontrivial H
  · obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := spectrum.nonempty a
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := le_trans (norm_nonneg (f ⟨s, hs⟩)) (hf_bounded ⟨s, hs⟩)
    exact le_trans h1 (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hvar_le hC)
  · rw [not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton] at hnt
    have hx : x = 0 := Subsingleton.eq_zero x
    have hy : y = 0 := Subsingleton.eq_zero y
    subst hx; subst hy
    simp only [norm_zero, zero_mul, mul_zero]
    have hvar0 : ((cfc_toComplexMeasure ha 0 0).variation Set.univ).toReal = 0 := by
      have hle : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha 0 0).variation Set.univ = 0 := by
        simp only [enorm_zero, mul_zero] at h2
        exact le_antisymm h2 (zero_le _)
      simp [hle]
    rw [hvar0, zero_mul] at h1
    linarith [norm_nonneg ((cfc_toComplexMeasure ha 0 0).integral f)]
